name: Lead Capture + Demo Booking Router
description: Universal webhook handling BOTH lead capture and demo booking events. Routes based on the 'event' field in the payload.
trigger: Webhook (POST from website lead capture forms + demo booking)

routes.lead_captured (default): Forward to /api/leads/webhook → HubSpot CRM sync + lead scoring
routes.demo_booked: Forward to /api/demo/book → HubSpot deal creation + confirmation email + calendar event

routing.note: Add a Router module in Make.com dashboard to split on {{1.event}} == 'demo_booked'

actions_lead: Receive lead data (email, name, company, source, product_interest)
Forward to AuthiChain /api/leads/webhook → HubSpot sync + lead scoring
actions_demo: Receive demo booking (name, email, company, date, time, message)
Forward to AuthiChain /api/demo/book → HubSpot deal + confirmation email
Optionally create Google Calendar event (add via Make.com dashboard)
setup_instructions: In Make.com dashboard: add a Router module after the webhook. Route 1 filter: {{1.event}} != 'demo_booked' → HTTP POST to /api/leads/webhook. Route 2 filter: {{1.event}} == 'demo_booked' → HTTP POST to /api/demo/book.
